title: The Quarterback
writer: William Slavens McNutt, W.O. McGeehan, Ray Harris
actors: Richard Dix, Esther Ralston, Harry Beresford
plot: Elmer Stone, quarterback of the 1899 Colton College football team vows to remain a student until Colton beats its biggest rival, State University. Twenty-seven years later, Elmer is still in school and is a classmate of his son, J...
